scope_completed: Created a Rust Cargo workspace with an autocomplete-protocol crate under crates/.
Added protocol request, response, error, client, document, cursor, context, options, health, cancel, and reload types with serde and schemars support.
Implemented protocol_version payload versioning, stable snake_case wire enums, serde unknown-field rejection, semantic validation, and configurable validation limits.
Added JSON Schema generation/export helpers for autocomplete request and response schemas.
Added workspace-level examples/fixtures for request, ok response, and error response.
Added fixture, schema, validation, and endpoint wire-name tests.
Added crates/autocomplete-protocol/README.md documenting transport, endpoints, fields, versioning, schema export, and error codes.

tdd_evidence.red: Request fixture test failed because schema, AutocompleteRequest, and Validate did not exist.
tdd_evidence.green: Implemented request-side protocol types, validation, and request schema generation.

tdd_evidence.red: Response fixture tests failed because AutocompleteResponse, ErrorCode, and response schema generation did not exist.
tdd_evidence.green: Implemented tagged response variants, protocol error/code types, metadata, response validation, and response schema generation.

tdd_evidence.red: Validation tests failed because ValidationErrors exposed no public iterator.
tdd_evidence.green: Added public iter() and into_inner() helpers and completed semantic validation assertions.

tdd_evidence.red: Schema export test failed because export_schema_files did not exist.
Endpoint response wire-name test failed because health/cancel/reload response types did not exist.
tdd_evidence.green: Implemented HealthResponse, CancelResponse, ReloadResponse, and associated status/provider enums.

remaining_risks: Cursor plausibility is only partially validated because prefix/suffix may be truncated by clients; future server/client work should decide when offset must match full-document context.

Only autocomplete request/response schemas are exported by default. Health/cancel/reload types derive JsonSchema but are not yet included in export_schema_files because downstream schema consumers are not defined.

Response metadata currently requires latency_ms, provider_latency_ms, and postprocessed whenever metadata is present; future provider/server work may need optional provider latency for cache/no-provider paths.
No HTTP server, provider, postprocessing pipeline, VS Code client, or Obsidian client was implemented in this task by design.
worktree_notes: Pre-existing unrelated deleted/untracked orchestration files are visible in git status; this task did not modify or restore them.
target/ is ignored via the new .gitignore after cargo test generated build artifacts.
